description: Aggregated sales and download data from App Store. Ref: https://developer.apple.com/help/app-store-connect/reference/reporting/summary-sales-report

Provider Country.description: Service provider country code, typically US

SKU.description: Product identifier provided by you during app setup

Developer.description: Provider name provided by you during initial account setup

Title.description: Name of app or IAP Product ID

Version.description: Version number provided by you during app setup

Product Type Identifier.description: Defines the type of transaction. Ref: https://developer.apple.com/help/app-store-connect/reference/reporting/product-type-identifiers

Units.description: Aggregated number of units. Negative values indicate refunds

Developer Proceeds (per unit).description: Amount you receive per unit after taxes and Apple commission

Customer Currency.description: Three-character ISO code for customer currency. Ref: https://developer.apple.com/help/app-store-connect/reference/reporting/currency-codes

Country Code.description: Two-character ISO country code of the App Store where purchase was made

Currency of Proceeds.description: Currency in which you receive proceeds

Customer Price.description: Price per unit billed to customer inclusive of applicable taxes. Negative = refund

Promo Code.description: Promotional or custom offer code used for the transaction

Parent Identifier.description: SKU of the app associated with the In-App Purchase

Subscription.description: Whether an auto-renewable subscription is New or a Renewal

Period.description: Duration of auto-renewable subscription: 7 days, 1 month, 2 months, 3 months, 6 months, 1 year

Category.description: Primary category of the app, such as Games

CMB.description: CMB if transaction completes an app bundle; CMB-C for app credits; blank otherwise

Supported Platforms.description: Platforms the app supports: iOS, macOS, tvOS, iOS and tvOS, visionOS, or iOS and visionOS

Device.description: Device type used for purchase: iPhone, iPad, iPod touch, Desktop, Apple TV, or Apple Vision

Preserved Pricing.description: Yes if price is preserved on Renew events; blank otherwise

Proceeds Reason.description: Rate After One Year if subscription active > 1 year (85% proceeds); blank otherwise (70%)

Client.description: Where purchase happened: App Store, iMessage, News, or blank

Order Type.description: Pre-order flag or introductory/promotional offer type

synced_at.description: Timestamp when Airbyte synced this record (metadata)
